name: @borjie/post-training-rlvr
description: Wave 19C — Post-training RLVR (Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards) orchestration. Verifier registry + reward shaping + trace capture + PII redaction + curation + run lifecycle. Bridges Mr. Mwikila session traces to provider fine-tuning endpoints with tenant-safe audit-chained artefacts. See Docs/DESIGN/RLVR_POST_TRAINING_SPEC.md.
